g.title: factorq
g.text: cleanroom read of source · 2026-07-16 · v1: a single `fq run` process hosts both control-plane and worker roles (boundary enforced by the worker::Worker trait)
solid = dataflow / requests · dashed = control & secondary paths · ①–⑧ = invocation lifecycle · grey dashed box = built but not yet wired in
